description: Lang-pack validation: `node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs && node scripts/validate-translations.cjs` passes for all 9 locales after each namespace update (covers key parity, missing/extra keys, interpolation variables, pseudo-locale patterns, Italian accents). Single check, run on every commit.

Static audit: automated grep confirms every target component file (all ~60 files listed in PRD sub-batches A/B/C) either contains `useTranslation` or is documented as zero-string. Run once per sub-batch PR. Can be a simple shell script or a single test file.

Regression: existing project-related unit/integration tests still pass (`npm test` for packages/projects). No new test files needed — wiring uses `t('key', 'English fallback')` so rendered text is identical in en locale.
Integration smoke: /msp/projects list page renders in xx pseudo-locale — filters, search placeholder, empty state, status tabs all show pseudo-text, no bare English in UI chrome.

Integration smoke: /msp/projects/[id] detail page renders in xx pseudo-locale — tabs, phases, tasks, budget/hours, kanban controls, materials drawer, task form, task dependencies, task documents, task-ticket links all show pseudo-text.

Integration smoke: /msp/projects/templates list + /msp/projects/templates/[id] editor + /msp/projects/templates/create wizard render in xx pseudo-locale — columns, filters, editor sections, wizard steps, nav buttons all show pseudo-text. Also verifies templates routes load features/projects namespace (F005).
Integration smoke: /msp/settings/project-settings renders in xx pseudo-locale — ProjectSettings, ProjectStatusSettings, TenantProjectTaskStatusSettings, AddStatusDialog all show pseudo-text.
Integration smoke: global quick-create dialog (ProjectQuickAdd reused in layout/QuickCreateDialog) renders in xx pseudo-locale with translated labels.
Manual: visual check /msp/projects/[id] in en — no layout shifts from key length differences in phase/task panels.
Manual: visual check /msp/projects/[id] in de — long German strings do not break TaskForm/TaskCard widths or kanban column headers.
Manual: visual check template wizard in de — step titles and nav buttons fit without wrapping/overflow.
